languages.text: "Когда придет время, ты поддержишь мои устремления, невзирая на недовольство прочих. Я дам тебе знак".

traits.locale_text: "Когда придет время, ты поддержишь мои устремления, невзирая на недовольство прочих. Я дам тебе знак".

languages.text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."
languages.original_text: "Когда придет время, ты поддержишь мои устремления, невзирая на недовольство прочих. Я дам тебе знак".

traits.locale_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."
"When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."
"When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

languages.text: “时机一到，你就得配合我的行动，不管别人有多不满。我会给你信号的。”
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

traits.locale_text: “时机一到，你就得配合我的行动，不管别人有多不满。我会给你信号的。”

languages.text: « Quand le moment viendra, vous vous rangerez de mon côté, même si certains s'y opposent. Je vous ferai signe. »
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

traits.locale_text: « Quand le moment viendra, vous vous rangerez de mon côté, même si certains s'y opposent. Je vous ferai signe. »

languages.text: "Zamanı geldiğinde, başkalarının hoşnutsuzluğuna bakılmaksızın beni destekleyeceksin. Sana işaret vereceğim."
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

traits.locale_text: "Zamanı geldiğinde, başkalarının hoşnutsuzluğuna bakılmaksızın beni destekleyeceksin. Sana işaret vereceğim."

languages.text: «Cuando llegue el momento, me ayudará en mis esfuerzos, independientemente de las opiniones ajenas. Le daré una señal».
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando llegue el momento, me ayudará en mis esfuerzos, independientemente de las opiniones ajenas. Le daré una señal».

languages.text: "Wenn die Zeit reif ist, werdet Ihr mich bei meinen Bemühungen unterstützen, ob es den Leuten passt oder nicht. Ich werde Euch ein Zeichen geben."
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn die Zeit reif ist, werdet Ihr mich bei meinen Bemühungen unterstützen, ob es den Leuten passt oder nicht. Ich werde Euch ein Zeichen geben."

languages.text: 「時は来るとき、私は努力を続ける。他人の不快を問わず、あなたは私を支えてくれる。私はあなたに合図を送る。」
languages.original_text: "When the time comes, you will support me in my endeavours, regardless of anyone else's displeasure. I will give you a sign."

traits.locale_text: 「時は来るとき、私は努力を続ける。他人の不快を問わず、あなたは私を支えてくれる。私はあなたに合図を送る。」
